title: EVgo Inc. Reports Record Third Quarter 2024 Results
text: EVgo reported record third quarter 2024 results with strong revenue growth. Revenue for Q3 2024 reached $67.5 million, compared to $35.1 million in Q3 2023, representing 92% year-over-year growth. Charging network revenue totaled $43.1 million in Q3, an increase of 98% year-over-year, representing the eighth sequential quarter of double-digit charging revenue growth. Network throughput reached a record 78 gigawatt-hours in Q3, an increase of 111% year-over-year, representing the seventh consecutive quarter of triple-digit year-over-year growth. The company added more than 270 new operational stalls during Q3, including EVgo eXtend stalls. The company ended Q3 with approximately 3,680 stalls in operation. The company added over 147,000 new customer accounts in Q3, reaching more than 1.2 million overall customer accounts at quarter end. The strong Q3 performance demonstrated continued momentum in EVgo's business with record throughput and expanding customer base.
